code: import React,{useEffect}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{useDispatch}from"react-redux";import{setLoginOpen}from"../store/store";export default function LoginPage(){const dispatch=useDispatch();const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{dispatch(setLoginOpen(true));navigate("/",{replace:true});},[dispatch,navigate]);return null;}
